message.content: @startuml title PB-158 UC8 SQD: Get campaigns customer is eligible for skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { ArrowColor #000000 LifeLineBorderColor #808080 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ParticipantBorderColor #808080 ParticipantBackgroundColor #EDEDED BoxBorderColor #808080 BoxBackgroundColor #DDDDDD NoteBorderColor #808080 NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4 } actor "Next Customer" as NC note top Abstract: This use cases describes the changes being made to an existing endpoint. The endpoint will be modified so that it can be called by the user and will return a list of campaigns that the customer is eligible for. A campaign logo version number will be returned, as well as a campaign logo image (if requested). end note note left of NC #E6A6E6 Endpoint: GET /campaigns Current implementation: Currently only called by system management, returns a list of all campaigns with the option to specify: • NAME • PARTNER_ID • OFFER_ID Required implementation: Either through extension of existing API or new, enable the user to call the endpoint. When a user calls the endpoint return a list of campaigns that the user is eligible for. As part of the request, include an optional field for whether or not to return the offer logo. As part of the CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL response include: • Campaign logo version number • Campaign logo (optional) ENSURE BACKWARDS COMPATIBILITY IS MAINTAINED end note box "Next Platform" #DDDDDD participant "P&O\n(Core Next)" as PO database "P&O DB" as PODB end box participant "Core Bradesco" as CB NC -> PO : 1 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO}) group filter on {NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID} PO -> PODB : 2 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO}) note right of PODB Note: Read P&O tables: • ELLIGIBLE_USER • CAMPAIGN end note PODB -> PODB : 3 Read campaigns user is eligible for PODB --> PO : 4 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL) end group alt if user has been or is eligible for at least one campaign PO --> NC : 5 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL) else if user is not eligible for any active campaigns PO --> NC : 6 Return error (MESSAGE) end alt @enduml
